title: VideoProductionManifest
description: A tool-agnostic, extensible schema for programmatic creation, storage, management, versioning, and orchestration of all assets required to generate and assemble high-quality videos up to 30 minutes in length.

DurationSeconds.description: Duration in seconds. Upper bound 1800 s (30 min) at project level; unconstrained at lower levels.

AssetRef.description: A typed reference to any asset by its ID. The 'type' discriminator allows resolvers to locate the asset in the correct collection.

version_pin.description: If present, pins this reference to a specific version. If absent, resolves to the latest approved version.

Resolution.description: Pixel dimensions. Named presets are informational; width/height are authoritative.

AspectRatio.description: Frame aspect ratio expressed as a rational number w:h.

FrameRate.description: Frame rate expressed as a rational number numerator/denominator.

ColorSpec.description: Color science specification for a render or asset.

QualityControls.description: Extensible quality control parameters applicable at project, scene, or shot level.

temporal_consistency_threshold.description: Minimum acceptable inter-frame feature consistency score [0,1]. Interpretation is pipeline-defined.

character_coherence_threshold.description: Minimum acceptable character identity consistency across shots [0,1].

color_grade_profile.description: Named color grade profile key, resolved in style_guide.

QualityControls.description: additionalProperties:true permits forward-compatible extension with any future quality parameter.

GenerativeParameters.description: Tool-agnostic generative-AI parameters. The 'tool' object is the primary discriminator; all other fields are interpretive hints. Unknown fields MUST be preserved under 'tool_specific'.

tool.description: Identifies the generative tool and its version. Fully open: any tool is expressible.

seed.description: Fixed seed for reproducibility. Null means random.

duration_seconds.description: Requested output duration for video/audio generation tools.

consistency_anchors.description: Assets used to anchor identity consistency (character refs, style refs, IP-Adapter images, ControlNet inputs, etc.).

weight.description: Influence weight [0,1] if supported by the tool.

model_checkpoint.description: Specific model checkpoint or fine-tune identifier.

camera_motion.description: Camera motion instructions for video generation tools.

custom_motion_vector.description: Free-form motion vector specification for tools supporting custom camera paths.

tool_specific.description: Opaque bucket for any tool-specific parameters not covered by the standardised fields above. Keys are tool-defined. Processors MUST preserve this object verbatim.

VersionRecord.description: Immutable version record attached to any versioned entity.

Dependency.description: Declares that an asset depends on another asset being available and at a satisfactory version before this asset can be generated or rendered.

StorageLocation.description: Tool-agnostic storage pointer for any binary or file-based asset.

uri.description: Relative or absolute URI: file://, s3://, gs://, https://, etc.

CameraSpec.description: Camera configuration for a shot. Maps to the formal apparatus of the companion camera document.

angle_predicate.description: Corresponds to C_bev, C_high, C_eye, C_low, C_wev, C_dutch, C_ots in the camera formal document.

LightingSpec.description: Lighting configuration for a shot or scene.

motivated.description: true = light sources exist diegetically in the scene.

hdri_ref.description: Reference to an HDRI environment map visual_asset.

SyncPoint.description: A synchronisation anchor between a video time offset and an audio time offset.

AssemblyInstruction.description: A single assembly operation in a render or composition pipeline. Operations are applied in array order.

parameters.description: Operation-specific parameters. Kept open for full extensibility.

library_hint.description: Advisory hint to the assembly pipeline. Does not mandate the library; resolvers may substitute equivalents.

manifest_id.description: Unique identifier for this manifest instance.

schema_version.description: Version of this JSON Schema definition. Consumers MUST validate against this version.

project.description: Top-level project envelope. All assets exist within a project context.

technical_spec.description: Project-wide default technical parameters. All assets inherit these unless they override at their own level.

entities.description: Master registry of all diegetic entities.

Story.description: The narrative arc of the project. Defines the high-level story structure independently of the script.

world_context.description: Description of the diegetic world W in which the story is set.

narrative_function.description: Maps to the eta (narrative function) apparatus in the companion scene document.

Script.description: Full production script including dialogue, action descriptions, and timing.

elements.description: Ordered sequence of script elements. Each element is typed.

timing.description: Optional timing annotation for this element.

DirectorInstructions.description: Global creative direction. Overridden at scene or shot level by local instructions.

influences.description: Reference directors, films, artworks, or other creative works.

do_not_do.description: Explicit prohibitions for the AI generation pipeline.

StyleGuide.description: Master style guide. Defines visual and audio style predicates that apply project-wide unless overridden.

animation_production_method.description: Axis A tag from the animation taxonomy companion document, e.g. 'A2.1' (keyframed 3D), 'A1.3' (digital frame-by-frame).

animation_subject_application.description: Axis B tag from the animation taxonomy companion document.

visual_style_tag.description: Axis D tag from the animation taxonomy companion document, e.g. 'D3.1' (classic manga), 'D6.1' (cel-shaded), 'D8.2' (cyberpunk).

video_style_predicate.description: S_X predicate from the video styles companion document, e.g. 'S_narr', 'S_doc', 'S_anim'.

color_grade_profiles.description: Named color grade profiles. Keys are profile names referenced by quality_controls.color_grade_profile.

generative_style_anchors.description: Visual assets used as style references across all generative calls.

Character.description: A diegetic character entity. Provides the consistency anchor for all character appearances across shots.

visual_description.description: Prose description fed to generative prompts.

voice_ref.description: Reference audio asset for voice cloning or voice matching.

default_generative_params.description: Default generative parameters for generating this character. Overridden per-shot.

diegetic_location_label.description: lambda value from the scene formal document.

Scene.description: A scene: a temporally and spatially coherent unit of the narrative. Maps to the Sigma tuple in the companion scene document.

scene_style_predicate.description: S_X predicate from the companion scene document, e.g. 'establishing', 'dialogue', 'action_sequence', 'montage', 'flashback'.

ontological_status.description: omega value from the companion scene document.

temporal_displacement.description: Relation between tau_d and tau_narr from the companion scene document.

diegetic_time_label.description: Human-readable diegetic time, e.g. 'dawn', 'interior night', 'flashback - 10 years prior'.

local_technical_overrides.description: Override any project-level technical_spec fields for this scene.

Shot.description: A single continuous camera exposure. The minimal unit of the pipeline. Maps to the Xi tuple in the companion camera document.

shot_scale.description: sigma component of psi from the companion camera document.

VisualAsset.description: Any still or video visual artifact: storyboard frame, character reference, environment matte, generated image, LUT file, HDRI, etc.

AudioAsset.description: Any audio artifact: voiceover, music track, sound effect, Foley, ambient bed, etc.

bpm.description: Beats per minute; populated for music assets.

diegetic_status.description: Maps to the epsilon component of delta in the companion video document.

character_ref.description: Character this audio belongs to, for dialogue or voiceover.

RenderOutput.description: A versioned final render or assembled video output. Produced by executing the assembly_instructions against resolved assets.

assembly_instructions.description: Ordered sequence of assembly operations producing this output. Applied in array order.

scene_sequence.description: Ordered list of scene references. The canonical editorial order of scenes in this output.

audio_tracks.description: Audio tracks included in this output with mix metadata.

render_pipeline_hint.description: Advisory hint for the assembly pipeline. Does not mandate the tool.

qa_checklist.description: QA items to be verified before this output is approved.

MarketingAsset.description: Promotional derivative of the project: trailers, thumbnails, social clips, press stills.

source_render_ref.description: The RenderOutput from which this marketing asset is derived.
